display.purpose: Hero names and primary emotional moments.

headline.purpose: Story, schedule, travel, gallery, and RSVP section titles.

label.purpose: Navigation, form labels, status tags, countdown labels.

shadows.name: ambient-paper-lift
shadows.purpose: Warm lift for venue cards, mobile menu, photo placeholders, and hover states.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for navigation, hovers, menu slide, and reveals.

motion.name: rise-reveal
motion.purpose: Soft entrance for page sections while preserving reduced-motion support.

components.name: Primary RSVP Button
components.description: Warm ceremonial action button for RSVP and future primary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #E7B98D; color: #33361F; border: 0; border-radius: 3px; padding: 15px 38px; font-family: Jost, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9rem; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), background 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #C77F52; color: #FBF6EE; transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #FBF6EE; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Travel Card
components.description: Compact guest logistics card for travel, stays, and public transport details.
components.html:
Nearby Stays

Recommended hotels and B&Bs close to the venue will be listed here.

Coming soon
components.css: .ds-travel-card { background: #FBF6EE; color: #33361F; border: 1px solid rgba(51,54,31,0.14); border-radius: 6px; padding: 32px; font-family: Jost, Arial, sans-serif; transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), box-shadow 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-travel-card:hover { transform: translateY(-6px); box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(94,84,45,0.12); } .ds-travel-card h3 { margin: 0 0 10px; font-family: Cormorant Garamond, Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .ds-travel-card p { margin: 0; max-width: 50ch; font-size: 0.92rem; line-height: 1.6; } .ds-travel-card span { display: inline-block; margin-top: 14px; color: #C77F52; font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: RSVP Field
components.description: Dark-section form field for RSVP details.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; color: #FBF6EE; font-family: Jost, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-field span { color: #E7B98D; font-size: 0.78rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-field input { background: rgba(251,246,238,0.08); border: 1px solid rgba(251,246,238,0.3); border-radius: 3px; padding: 13px 16px; color: #FBF6EE; font: inherit; font-size: 0.98rem; transition: border-color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), background 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-field input::placeholder { color: rgba(251,246,238,0.65); } .ds-field input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #E7B98D; background: rgba(251,246,238,0.14); } .ds-field input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #FBF6EE; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Schedule Row
components.description: Readable day-of-event row with time as the scanning anchor.
components.html:
~1:30 PM
Ceremony

We say our vows at Southdowns Manor. Please arrive with time to be seated.
components.css: .ds-schedule-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 130px 1fr; gap: 24px; padding: 28px 0; border-top: 1px solid rgba(51,54,31,0.14); color: #33361F; font-family: Jost, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-schedule-row time { color: #5C6B44; font-family: Cormorant Garamond, Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.3rem; } .ds-schedule-row strong { display: block; margin-bottom: 6px; font-family: Cormorant Garamond, Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 600; } .ds-schedule-row p { margin: 0; max-width: 50ch; font-size: 0.92rem; line-height: 1.6; } @media (max-width: 520px) { .ds-schedule-row { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 8px; } }

components.name: Botanical Divider
components.description: Signature ceremonial sprig used sparingly between major page moments.
components.html: <svg class="ds-sprig" viewBox="0 0 120 60" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M60 55 C 60 40, 40 30, 20 20"/><path d="M60 55 C 60 40, 80 30, 100 20"/><ellipse cx="20" cy="18" rx="7" ry="4" transform="rotate(-30 20 18)"/><ellipse cx="100" cy="18" rx="7" ry="4" transform="rotate(30 100 18)"/><ellipse cx="60" cy="10" rx="6" ry="9"/></svg>
components.css: .ds-sprig { width: 120px; height: auto; opacity: 0.85; } .ds-sprig path { stroke: #6E7A45; stroke-width: 1.5; vector-effect: non-scaling-stroke; } .ds-sprig ellipse { fill: #E7B98D; vector-effect: non-scaling-stroke; } .ds-sprig ellipse:last-child { fill: #C77F52; }

narrative.overview: A personal invitation carried through a countryside garden: warm, practical, botanical, and guest-first. The system preserves the current cream, sage, peach, and terracotta palette with Cormorant Garamond display type and Jost body copy.
keyCharacteristics: Warm practical pages for invited guests
Botanical detail used as a signature
Soft contrast between cream surfaces and garden-toned accents

rules.name: Guest-First Contrast
rules.body: Body text stays close to Garden Ink or Invitation Cream; decorative pale text is not allowed to carry essential information.

rules.name: Invitation-Not-Broadsheet
rules.body: Use the serif for warmth and names, but do not turn every section into editorial magazine styling.

rules.name: Soft-Lift
rules.body: Shadows appear only when a surface needs tactile emphasis or hierarchy.

dos: Do preserve the existing color tokens from diego-bethany-wedding.html.
Do keep guest logistics easy to scan.
Do use Cormorant Garamond for names and ceremonial accents.
Do use Jost for practical guest copy and forms.
donts: Don't make the interface gray, flat, or static.
Don't let placeholders dominate once real imagery is available.
Don't reduce essential guest information to low-contrast decorative color.
